text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you help keep our community safe and welcoming!
Welcome to the community, @guide_sam! You're now an event helper. Thanks for stepping up to help organize our activities!
Welcome to the community, @newbie_kim! We're glad to have you as a new member. Feel free to introduce yourself and ask questions!
Welcome to the community, @mentor_lina! You're approved as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable to our newer members!
